question: You receive a text from an unknown number asking you to click a link to claim a prize. What do you do?
You get an email saying your account will be locked unless you enter your password. What do you do?
A message says you won a free phone but asks for personal info. What do you do?
An email looks like it's from your school but has spelling mistakes. What do you do?
You get a message asking for your login details. What do you do?
A friend sends a strange link you weren't expecting. What do you do?
An email says 'urgent action required' with a link. What do you do?
You get a fake-looking invoice email. What do you do?
A website asks for your password after clicking a link. What do you do?
You see a suspicious message with bad grammar. What do you do?
A message offers free game coins if you log in. What do you do?
You get an email from 'support' asking for info. What do you do?
A text says your package is delayed, click link. What do you do?
You receive a fake login page. What do you do?
Someone asks for your password in chat. What do you do?
A message claims to be from a bank you don't use. What do you do?
You get a suspicious QR code. What do you do?
An email says you've been hacked, click link. What do you do?
A message asks for your address. What do you do?
You see a fake giveaway post. What do you do?
A link looks suspicious and shortened. What do you do?
